player.speakerUnavailable: Speaker unavailable. Please check your media player and try again.
player.hostCannotLeave: Host cannot leave. End the game instead.

lobby.title: Waiting for game to start...
lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for host to start the game...
lobby.invitePlayersHint: Share this QR code or link with friends
lobby.howToPlayStep1: Listen to the song that plays
lobby.howToPlayStep2: Guess what year it was released
lobby.howToPlayStep3: Submit before the timer runs out
lobby.scanQrHint: Share the QR code or URL above

game.introSplashDesc: Stop the song the moment you recognise it!
game.noBonusThisRound: No bonus this round — nail the year
game.pausedHint: The game will resume when the host returns

steal.selectTargetHint: Copy their answer for this round
steal.waitForSubmit: No players have submitted yet. Wait for someone to submit their guess.

reveal.idleHaltBanner: Game idle — no one played this round. Tap Next round to keep going.

stats.title: Round stats
stats.onlyPercent: Only {percent}% of all players guess it right.
stats.empty: No stats for this round yet.

missedSub: The clock waits for no one!

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.waitForHost: Wait for the host to start a new game

admin.title: Beatify Admin
admin.importPlaylistHint: Paste a Spotify playlist URL to import it as a Beatify playlist. Requires Spotify API credentials (one-time setup).
admin.spotifyCredsGuide: To get credentials: Go to developer.spotify.com/dashboard, create an app (any name), and copy the Client ID and Client Secret.
admin.importNote: Imports songs with year, artist, title and streaming URIs for all 5 providers. Fun facts and chart data can be added later.
admin.endGameConfirmFull: End game and show final results?
admin.rematchConfirmMessage: All scores will reset. Players stay connected.

reset.title: Reset Beatify?
reset.message: Ends any active game and forgets your last setup. Connected players will be disconnected. The integration itself stays installed.

admin.enterDisplayName: Enter your display name to join as a player with admin controls.
admin.difficultyEasyDesc: Forgiving scoring: Guess within 7 years to score. Exact match = 10 pts, within 7 years = 5 pts, within 10 years = 1 pt.
admin.difficultyNormalDesc: Standard scoring: Guess within 3 years to score. Exact match = 10 pts, within 3 years = 5 pts, within 5 years = 1 pt.
admin.difficultyHardDesc: Challenging scoring: Only close guesses count. Exact match = 10 pts, within 2 years = 3 pts, otherwise no points.
admin.introModeHint: ~20% of rounds play only the song intro. Players must guess the year from just the opening seconds. Requires at least 3 rounds.
admin.closestWinsModeHint: Only the closest guess earns points
admin.closestWinsHint: Only the player with the closest guess scores points each round. All-or-nothing showdown.
admin.roundsHint: Total number of rounds in the game, based on the selected playlists.
admin.languageHint: Sets the language for all players during the game.
admin.timerHint: How many seconds players have to submit their guess each round.
admin.revealAdvanceHint: After the reveal the next round starts on its own — after a fixed time, or (Off) when the song finishes playing. The game runs without anyone at the admin screen.
admin.difficultyHint: Easy: wide tolerance (±7 years). Normal: medium (±3 years). Hard: only close guesses score.
admin.artistChallengeHint: After each round, players can guess the artist for bonus points. First correct guess earns +5 points.
admin.movieQuizHint: For soundtrack songs, players guess the movie for tiered bonus points. Only triggers on songs with movie metadata.
admin.spotifyUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid Spotify playlist URL
admin.howItWorks3: Update Beatify to get the new playlist
admin.playlistCriteria1: Themed by genre, era or occasion — not a personal mix of favourites
admin.playlistCriteria2: Not already one of Beatify's playlists
admin.playlistCriteria3: A fixed selection — not an auto-updating chart (e.g. Top 50 Global)
admin.playlistCriteria4: Curated in size — very large playlists (1000+ tracks) can't be processed
admin.playlistCriteria5: Songs a party crowd can recognise and place in time
admin.playlistCriteria6: Free of explicit or offensive content
admin.requestFailed: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
admin.ttsEntityNone: No TTS entities — add one in HA first
admin.ttsVerbosityHint: How much the game announces — pick a preset, or fine-tune the toggles below
admin.ttsAnnounceWinnerHint: Announce the winner at game end
admin.ttsAnnounceRoundStartHint: Announce the start of each round
admin.ttsAnnounceCountdownHint: Speak a 3-2-1 countdown before each round
admin.ttsAnnounceTimeUpHint: Announce when the round timer runs out
admin.ttsAnnounceCorrectAnswerHint: Announce the correct year at reveal
admin.ttsAnnounceNobodyCorrectHint: Announce when no one guessed the exact year
admin.ttsAnnounceExactGuessHint: Announce players who guessed the year exactly
admin.ttsAnnounceStreakMilestoneHint: Announce when a player hits a streak milestone
admin.ttsAnnounceStreakBrokenHint: Announce when a notable streak ends
admin.ttsAnnounceLeaderChangeHint: Announce when a new player takes the lead
admin.ttsAnnounceTiedFirstHint: Announce when the leaderboard is tied for first
admin.ttsAnnounceBetWonHint: Announce when a player wins a double-or-nothing bet
admin.ttsAnnounceBetLostHint: Announce when a player loses a bet
admin.ttsAnnouncePlayerJoinHint: Announce when a new player joins the game
admin.ttsAnnounceLastRoundHint: Announce when the final round begins
admin.ttsAnnouncePodiumHint: Read out the top 3 finishers at game end
admin.ttsAnnounceIntroRoundHint: Announce when an intro-mode round starts
admin.ttsAnnounceStealUnlockedHint: Announce when a player unlocks the steal power-up
admin.ttsAnnounceStealUsedHint: Announce when a player steals another's answer

pauseRecovery.title: Game paused
pauseRecovery.mediaPlayerError: Playback did not start — the speaker is not responding. This often means {provider} in Music Assistant needs re-authentication — open Settings → Music Assistant → {provider} → Reconnect, then click Resume.
pauseRecovery.mediaPlayerErrorGeneric: Playback did not start — the speaker is not responding. This often means your music provider in Music Assistant needs re-authentication — open Settings → Music Assistant → your provider → Reconnect, then click Resume.
pauseRecovery.noSongsAvailable: No playable songs left for this provider. Resume to retry, or end the game.

admin.haEntitiesDesc: Beatify exposes live game state as Home Assistant entities. Find them under Developer Tools → States or search for beatify in your entity registry.

home.setupSub: Takes about 2 minutes. We'll walk you through speakers, music service, playlists, and game mode.
home.needPlayerToStart: Join as player (or ask a guest to scan the QR) before starting.
home.wsReconnecting: Reconnecting to game server — please try again.

analyticsDashboard.title: Beatify Analytics
analyticsDashboard.subtitle: Analytics
analyticsDashboard.playToTrack: Play some games to start tracking song statistics
analyticsDashboard.notEnoughData: Not enough data to determine difficulty
analyticsDashboard.streakHint: Players earn streaks by guessing correctly multiple times in a row
analyticsDashboard.bettingHint: Players can bet to triple their points — but only an exact-year guess wins

dashboard.title: Beatify - Dashboard
dashboard.startFromAdmin: Start a game from the admin page
dashboard.landscapeHint: This dashboard works best in landscape mode

launcher.title: Beatify
launcher.openingInNewTab: Opening Beatify in a new tab...
launcher.openedInNewTab: Beatify opened in a new tab!
launcher.clickToOpenAnother: Click the button to open another window, or navigate elsewhere in Home Assistant.
launcher.popupBlocked: Pop-up blocked! Click the button below.
launcher.allowPopups: Your browser blocked the pop-up. Please allow pop-ups for this site.
launcher.clickToLaunch: Launch the game in fullscreen — no distractions.

stats.newRecord: New Record! Highest scoring game ever!
stats.closeToAverage: Close to average! Just {diff} pts below

errors.GAME_ALREADY_STARTED: A game is already in progress. End the current game before starting a new one.
errors.GAME_IN_LOBBY: A game is already waiting in the lobby — start gameplay instead.
errors.GITHUB_ERROR: Backend is unavailable right now — please try again in a moment.
errors.INVALID_FORMAT: That doesn’t look like a valid Spotify playlist URL.
errors.PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND: Playlist not found. Is the URL correct and the playlist public?
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests — please wait a minute and try again.
errors.SESSION_TAKEOVER: Session taken over by another tab
errors.askHostNewGame: Ask the host to start a new game.
errors.askHostQr: Ask the host for a new QR code.
errors.checkNetwork: Make sure you're connected to the network
errors.connectionLostHint: We couldn't reconnect to the game server.
errors.gameInProgressHint: The game is currently in a round. Try again in a moment.
errors.gameNotFoundHint: This game doesn't exist or the link is incorrect.

highlights.highlight_streak: {player} is on fire! {count} in a row 🔥
highlights.highlight_heartbreaker: {player} was SO close on '{song}' — off by just {years_off} year!

ttsWinner: And the winner is... {name} with {score} points!
introSplashDesc: The song plays — stop it the moment you recognise it! The faster you stop, the more points you earn.

step1.title: Where should the music play?
step1.sub: Pick one or more smart speakers. We'll play through the one you pick first.

step2.title: Who's streaming?
step2.sub: Pick the service your speaker uses. Beatify plays songs through whatever you already have configured in Home Assistant.

explainer.title: {provider} on {platform} needs Music Assistant
explainer.body: {platform} plays Spotify directly from Home Assistant. {provider} and other streaming services need the Music Assistant add-on to route the track — it handles the login and format conversion {platform} can't do on its own.
explainer.step2: Add your {provider} account in MA → Providers
explainer.step3: Come back — your {platform} appears as a Music Assistant speaker
explainer.footer: Prefer Spotify? It works on {platform} directly — no add-on needed.

step3.title: Pick your first playlist.
step3.sub: Pick one or more curated Beatify packs. Mix genres or decades — you can add more in the admin later.

step4.title: How do you want to play?
step4.sub: Defaults work for most parties. Tweak if you want.
step4.difficultyHintEasy: Forgiving: 10 pts for an exact year, 5 pts within ±7 years, 1 pt within ±10 years.
step4.difficultyHintNormal: Balanced: 10 pts for an exact year, 5 pts within ±3 years, 1 pt within ±5 years.
step4.difficultyHintHard: Sharp: 10 pts for an exact year, 3 pts within ±2 years, otherwise 0.

step5.title: Level up your party.
step5.sub: Optional. Skip all of this and Beatify still works.

lights.title: Party lights
lights.desc: Sync your smart lights to the beat. Pulse on round changes, flash on winner.
lights.unavailable: No lights found in Home Assistant.
lights.wledHint: Enter the WLED preset slot number (0–16) to trigger for each game phase.

tts.title: Voice announcements
tts.desc: TTS calls out round numbers, winners, and fun facts.
tts.unavailable: No TTS service registered in Home Assistant.
tts.entityHint: No TTS service yet? In Home Assistant: Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration → 'Google Translate text-to-speech' (free, no API key). It will then appear in this list.
tts.entityNone: No TTS entities — add one in HA first
tts.verbosityHint: How much the game announces. Fine-tune individual events later in admin settings.

onboarding.betCaption: Nail the exact year. Win triple.
onboarding.stealCaption: Copy another player. Once per game.
onboarding.stealHint: Use it when you have no idea.
onboarding.artistCaption: Some rounds reward the artist too.
onboarding.startAnyway: {count} player is still learning the rules. Start anyway?
onboarding.startAnywayPlural: {count} players are still learning the rules. Start anyway?

banner.title: Nothing here for you? Request a playlist.
banner.sub: Describe the genre, era, vibe. A maintainer ships it in 24–48h.

empty.title: No requests yet
empty.body: Missing a genre, era or regional scene? Request it. A maintainer adds it in 24–48h.

request.title: Request a playlist
request.sub: Paste a Spotify playlist URL and submit.

newRequest.title: Request another playlist
newRequest.sub: Paste a Spotify URL, we take it from there.

meanwhile.title: Meanwhile, browse community playlists
meanwhile.sub: User-contributed picks, installable in one tap.

generator.title: Or generate your own with an LLM
generator.sub: Spotify URL → copy prompt → run it in your LLM → paste back → validate → submit.
generator.subShort: Spotify URL → prompt → JSON → validate → submit.

noSearch.title: No matches for
noSearch.body: Nothing here matches. Try a different query, or check the other tab.

noFilter.title: No playlists match
noFilter.body: Try removing the filter or requesting this genre.

communityEmpty.title: No community playlists installed
communityEmpty.body: Community playlists ship with Beatify. Update the integration to get the latest batch.

playlistGenerator.title: Playlist Generator
playlistGenerator.intro: Paste a Spotify playlist URL → copy a prompt → run it in your own LLM (ChatGPT, Claude.ai, local) → paste the JSON back → validate → submit. No LLM calls leave Beatify.

fields.jsonPaste: Paste the LLM's JSON output here

hints.promptCopied: Prompt copied to clipboard — paste it into your LLM.
hints.clipboardUnavailable: Could not access clipboard — select the prompt manually below.
hints.resultCopied: Validation feedback copied — paste it back into your LLM.
hints.copyResultHint: Paste this back into your LLM to ask for a corrected JSON.
hints.submitTooltip: Open a new GitHub issue with the JSON pre-filled
hints.saveLocalTooltip: Coming in v1.1 — needs backend support
hints.sanitized: Auto-cleaned {n} URL wrapper(s) before validating (Markdown autolink artifacts).
hints.sanitizedBoth: Auto-cleaned: stripped a Markdown wrapper around the JSON and {n} URL wrapper(s) before validating.
hints.sanitizedWrapper: Auto-cleaned: stripped a Markdown wrapper around the JSON before validating.

verdict.fail: ✗ Validation failed — fix the rows highlighted above and re-validate.
